problem: What is the value of $101^{4} - 4 \cdot 101^{3} + 6 \cdot 101^2 - 4 \cdot 101 + 1$?  (No calculators!)

classified_questions.question: Can you explain the pattern you see in the coefficients of the powers of 101?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How does recognizing the coefficients as binomial coefficients help in this problem?
